input.tenant_message: There are some old stains on the living room carpet that were here when I moved in — I took photos on move-in day but I want to make sure they're noted in the system so I'm not charged for them when I move out. I'm also noticing a musty smell coming from that area that seems to be getting worse.

ai_output.recommended_action: Document tenant's photo evidence in the unit file and acknowledge pre-existing stains. Schedule a maintenance inspection to assess the musty odor, which may indicate moisture or mold beneath the carpet that warrants further investigation.
